FAQ

What accuracy can TOKNAV GNSS receivers achieve?+

TOKNAV RTK receivers are designed for centimeter-level positioning when used with suitable correction data, good satellite visibility and correct field setup.

Do you support distributor-ready product configuration?+

Yes. TOKNAV supports kit configuration, accessory matching, product packaging and documentation for distributors and project partners.

What is the warranty and after-sales support?+

Warranty and support terms depend on product model and order plan. Our team can provide datasheets, test guidance and remote technical support.

Which industries are your products suitable for?+

TOKNAV products are used in surveying, mapping, construction, precision agriculture, machine control, monitoring, GIS and solution integration.
